name: Lossless OpenClaw Orchestrator
description: Collaborate with local Codex sessions through OpenClaw using local indexing, prepared-state recall, bounded expansion, and approval-gated dry-run/control boundaries.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_index_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: Index local Codex session JSONL files into the local orchestrator database.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_search_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: Search indexed Codex sessions with bounded safe text.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_grep
toolDeclarations.description: Search Codex index and optional read-only OpenClaw LCM peer DBs with source-prefixed refs.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_describe_ref
toolDeclarations.description: Describe a source-prefixed recall ref such as codex_thread:* or lcm_summary:*.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Look up a specific session or source ref after the inbox identifies it.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_expand_session
toolDeclarations.description: Expand one indexed Codex session into a bounded evidence brief.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_expand_query
toolDeclarations.description: Search then expand the best matching Codex or LCM peer recall ref.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Expand one bounded evidence brief from a query when the ref is not known.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_prepared_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Read the deterministic execute-false prepared-state attention inbox.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Start from the compact prepared-state operating picture.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_prepared_state
toolDeclarations.description: Read prepared-state status, cards, summary leaves, or bounded summary expansion through one canonical prepared-state surface.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_recent_sessions
toolDeclarations.description: List recent or active Codex sessions as compact public-safe cards without requiring query text.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Refresh recent or active session cards after reads or approved actions.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_watchers
toolDeclarations.description: Read watcher status, dry-run request packets, persisted watcher events, or one resume-request packet through a canonical execute-false watcher surface.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_app_server_status
toolDeclarations.description: Read Codex app-server status and read-method posture without enabling control.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_app_server_threads
toolDeclarations.description: Read Codex app-server thread metadata and loaded-signal posture without turns or raw paths.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_visible_codex_map
toolDeclarations.description: Join indexed session cards with optional visible Codex and read-only app-server signals.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_project_digest
toolDeclarations.description: Create a read-only Eva operating digest from LCO/Codex cards, optional structured GitHub items, PLAN_STATE pins, and source authority coverage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create a bounded provenance and handoff digest from available operating inputs.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_attention_inbox
toolDeclarations.description: Return only operating-picture cards that need action, review, approval, watch, or blocker triage.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Review the compact attention queue before choosing a next action.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_business_pulse
toolDeclarations.description: Answer 'How is the business?' from bounded cited operating cards with explicit source and authority coverage gaps.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_operating_picture
toolDeclarations.description: Read deterministic Codex and Eva operating-picture maps, inboxes, pins, GitHub items, or autonomy planning state through one canonical read-only surface.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_extract
toolDeclarations.description: Read extracted Codex plans, final messages, touched files, or tool-call metadata through one canonical extraction surface.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_closeout_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Preview public-safe closeout envelopes that a hook-agent could attach without mutating Codex.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_session_sanitizer
toolDeclarations.description: Dry-run public-safe sanitizer findings from indexed Codex safe text without reading raw transcripts or mutating sessions.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_sqlite_stores
toolDeclarations.description: Probe local Codex state_*.sqlite and logs_*.sqlite stores read-only.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_lcm_peer_dbs
toolDeclarations.description: Probe configured OpenClaw LCM peer DBs read-only.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_control_dry_run
toolDeclarations.description: Create a dry-run audit id for a Codex control action.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Create the exact dry-run action packet and approval hashes before live control.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_start_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Create a new Codex thread. Dry-run by default; live mode requires approval_audit_id and still needs follow-up proof before durability claims.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_resume_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Resume or rejoin a Codex thread without starting a turn. Live mode requires approval_audit_id.

metadata.operatorPathRole: Run the approved resume action only after a matching dry-run audit id.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_send_message
toolDeclarations.description: Send a message to a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id and waits for bounded turn proof.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_steer_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Steer a running Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id and expected_turn_id.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_codex_interrupt_thread
toolDeclarations.description: Interrupt a Codex thread. Live mode requires approval_audit_id; expected_turn_id enables bounded turn proof.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_desktop_act
toolDeclarations.description: Dry-run desktop fallback action for CUA/Peekaboo; live requests return structured missing-proof blockers.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_desktop_proof_action
toolDeclarations.description: Run the one approved CUA TextEdit scratch launch proof action and return a public-safe observation for proof-report validation.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_desktop_proof
toolDeclarations.description: Read or validate desktop proof/check surfaces through one canonical proof surface without broad GUI mutation.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_doctor
toolDeclarations.description: Read local orchestrator health.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_permissions
toolDeclarations.description: Read safety posture for live controls.

toolDeclarations.name: lco_audit_tail
toolDeclarations.description: Read recent local audit records without raw prompt text.

namingPolicy.aliasPolicy: `lco_*` is the canonical runtime and public tool prefix. The redirect alias registry maintains backward compatible `loo_*` aliases for every canonical tool plus folded historical C1 leaf aliases. Redirect aliases can provide `kindDefaults`; caller arguments override those defaults at dispatch. Each alias carries `metadata.aliasOf`; redirect aliases do not create separate coverage obligations.

desktopFallback.missingPreferredBackendBehavior: normal read/search/describe workflows continue; desktop fallback readiness reports an actionable CUA blocker
desktopFallback.proofBoundary: CUA fallback readiness reports daemon and blocker state; MCP launchability still requires an explicit `cua-driver mcp --help` check unless LCO adds a launch probe. Codex composer-write proof needs a separately documented read-back before any send claim, and the current LCO proof report/live-proof harness do not validate a composer read-back field. No generic GUI mutation, unattended control, no-focus behavior, composer send approval, or release readiness is claimed without action-bound proof.

facade.description: Expose public-facade canonical lco_* tools and their loo_* compatibility aliases.

standard.description: Expose public-facade and workflow-detail canonical lco_* tools plus loo_* compatibility aliases whose targets are in profile.

all.description: Expose the full canonical LCO lco_* catalog, direct loo_* compatibility aliases, and folded historical loo_* compatibility aliases.

exposureProfile.callPolicy: LCO_TOOL_PROFILE filters tools/list and OpenClaw declarations only; hidden tools remain callable by exact name when invoked by a capable client. LOO_TOOL_PROFILE is accepted as a compatibility fallback.

retrievalTelemetry.privacyBoundary: When LCO_TELEMETRY=1 and a telemetry session id is supplied, affected search/describe/expand tools may write opt-in local derived-cache telemetry. LOO_TELEMETRY remains a compatibility fallback. Raw query text is not stored in telemetry rows or harvest proposals; public reports and metrics remain aggregate counts/ranks/hashes/placeholders only.

toolSurface.proofBoundary: This metadata defines recommended operator tiers only. It does not remove tools, hide expert/debug surfaces, loosen approvals, run live Codex control, mutate a GUI, publish npm, or create GitHub releases. Opt-in retrieval telemetry, when enabled, is limited to local derived-cache writes.
